note: authoritative DEBUG=2 GPU kernel time (compute kernels, excl device-init copy); supersedes the wall-clock Phase-3/4 numbers which measured host dispatch, not GPU exec
verdict: REFUTED: score-free fused kernel is correct but memory-bound (per-d HBM re-streaming, no LDS reuse) -> far slower than SDPA; real speedup needs LDS tiling (BEAM-territory, hangs gfx1100). Flash-prefill BANKED as correct-but-not-performant.
